Description:
Go beyond basics and discover how you can improve tool calling accuracy for AI Agents, using Finetuning in Microsoft Foundry. This video shows how to improve reliable tool calling in AI agents and unpacks the powerful process of model distillation, taking the capabilities of large models and shrinking them into more nimble, cost-effective counterparts. We will guide you step-by-step through synthetic data generation, advanced finetuning methodologies, and practical ways to make agents more accurate.

00:02 Welcome and scenario 03:05 Generating synthetic data 04:36 Model Distillation and finetuning

Microsoft Foundry - https://aka.ms/foundry-ft Foundry Finetuning Demos on GitHub - https://aka.ms/ft-demos

Bethany Jepchumba, Twitter/X - https://twitter.com/bethanyjep Bethany Jepchumba, LinkedIn - https://www.linkedin.com/in/bethany-jep/ Bethany Jepchumba, GitHub - https://github.com/bethanyjep
Title: Model Optimization in Microsoft Foundry: AI Agents Tool Calling Accuracy
Author: Microsoft Developer
